Our Story

Made with love,
baked with intention.

Weekend Loaf was born from a love for bold spices and slow baking. We believe bread should taste like something — warm cumin, toasted coriander, fresh herbs — not like a shelf.

Every loaf is mixed by hand, proofed overnight, and baked in small batches so you get something truly fresh. We bake on weekends, which means each order is made with the kind of care that only comes when you're not rushing.

No Preservatives
No Additives
Weekend Batches
Handcrafted
Signature Product

The Masala Loaf

Our hero. A bread that carries the soul of Indian spice kitchens and the warmth of Texas homes.

Signature

Flavor Notes

Warm cumin, toasted coriander, green chili, fresh cilantro, a hint of garam masala

Texture

Soft, pillowy crumb with a lightly crisp golden crust — chewy in the best way

Best Used For

Toasted with butter, grilled sandwiches, panini, avocado toast, or simply on its own

What's Inside

Unbleached flourFiltered waterSea saltActive dry yeastCumin seedsCorianderGreen chiliFresh cilantroOlive oil

No preservatives. No artificial flavors. Nothing you can't pronounce.

Order a Loaf
How It Works

Fresh bread, made simple.

No app, no subscription, no fuss. Just a WhatsApp message and a weekend pickup.

01

Message Us on WhatsApp

Send us a message with your order. We'll confirm availability and details within a few hours.

02

Pick Your Weekend

We bake in limited batches every weekend. Choose your preferred pickup date when you order.

03

Pick Up Fresh

Collect your loaf from our Texas location. Baked that morning, ready for your table.

Limited Availability

Weekend batches go fast.

We bake a small number of loaves each weekend. Place your order by Thursday to reserve yours.

Order on WhatsApp
Why Weekend Loaf

Bread worth waiting for.

Small Batch

Every loaf is made in limited quantities so freshness and quality never get compromised.

No Additives

Clean ingredients only. No artificial preservatives, no dough conditioners, no shortcuts.

Freshly Baked

Baked to order every weekend morning. No day-old loaves, no freezer inventory.

Unique Indian Flavors

Inspired by the spice pantry of India, adapted for the Texan palate. Bold, warm, unforgettable.
